activities_projects.title: Research Project on Democratic and Non-Democratic Countries
steps: Select one democratic and one non-democratic country
Research their political systems
Prepare a comparative report
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of research and comparison (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Analysis of Democratic Features
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate how democratic principles work in real life
steps: Study the four features of democracy
Find real-world examples for each feature
Explain how these features strengthen democracy
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students apply theoretical concepts to real situations
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of examples and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Essay on Why Democracy is the Best Form of Government
steps: Identify arguments supporting democracy
Write an essay explaining these arguments
Include examples from different countries
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop critical thinking and writing skills

activities_projects.title: Mock Parliament Activity
steps: Assign roles such as ministers, opposition and speaker
Discuss a proposed policy
Debate and vote on the decision

activities_projects.title: Critical Review of Elections
steps: Study election systems in different countries
Identify factors affecting fairness
Write a critical review

activities_projects.title: Research on Citizens’ Rights
steps: List fundamental rights of citizens
Explain their role in protecting democracy
Provide examples where rights were violated
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand legal protection of rights

activities_projects.title: Democracy and Social Diversity Study
steps: Study how democracy manages social diversity
Provide examples from India
Explain the importance of tolerance and participation
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students analyse democracy in diverse societies

activities_projects.title: Role of Opposition in Democracy
steps: Study the role of opposition parties
Explain how they ensure accountability
Provide examples from parliamentary debates

activities_projects.title: Democratic Values Campaign
steps: Design a campaign promoting democratic values
Create posters and slogans
Present them to classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop awareness of democratic values

activities_projects.title: Critical Analysis of Democracy in India
steps: Identify strengths and weaknesses of democracy in India
Analyse political participation and governance
Write a report with suggestions for improvement
